examples:
Command Example
symantec-mc-get-device uuid="C131C3D1-171B-4DA7-ADE2-AA736EA91540"
Context Example
{
"SymantecMC.Device": {
"SerialNumber": "0806315479",
"Name": "192.168.1.207 - Blue Coat SG-VA Series",
"LastChangedBy": "admin",
name: symantec-mc-get-device

outputs.description: Device last changed date. SymantecMC.Device.LastChangedBy User that last changed the device.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Device.LastChanged

outputs.description: Device OS version. SymantecMC.Device.Build Device build number.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Device.OSVersion

outputs.description: Device serial number. SymantecMC.Device.Host Device host address.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Device.SerialNumber

outputs.description: Device management status. SymantecMC.Device.DeploymentStatus Device deployment status.
outputs.name: SymantecMC.Device.ManagementStatus
